# §IV.F — Work-Related Childcare Billing Violations

**SPP Reference:** Section IV.F — Work-Related Child Care
**Violation Type:** Billing Eli for childcare costs generated by Melissa's own visit refusals
**Documented Violations:** 10 RF-06 signals (8 Sev-1, 2 Sev-2); Phase C compound confirmed at CP2

---

## Exact SPP Language

**§IV.F — Work-Related Child Care:**
> Mother shall pay the childcare provider directly and shall provide Father with a **receipt within 48 hours**.
>
> Father shall **reimburse Mother within 7 days** of receipt.

The provision assumes legitimate childcare expenses — costs incurred because both parents are working and Eli has parenting time during which childcare is otherwise not needed. The provision does not contemplate billing Eli for childcare costs that arise from Melissa's refusal to transfer the child for his parenting time.

---

## The Billing-on-Refused-Visits Pattern

During Phase C (August 2025–April 2026), Melissa refused Eli's scheduled weekend visits — using the required-intermediary relay to communicate that Olivia "doesn't want to go." Because Olivia did not spend those weekends with Eli, Melissa incurred childcare costs covering those same weekend hours. Melissa then billed Eli for those childcare costs.

**The compound:**
1. Melissa refuses Eli's parenting time (RF-02 signal)
2. Because the visit was refused, Melissa needs childcare during those hours
3. Melissa bills Eli for the childcare costs she created by refusing his visit

Eli pays financially for time that was denied to him. This is documented as a Phase C compound confirmed at ADD-003 CP2 review.

---

- **Childcare-Receipt-Log.xlsx** — itemizes payments and dates
- **RF-02 visit refusal record** — 104 signals, including Phase C refusal dates
- Dates that appear on both documents are the billing-on-refused-visits instances

---

## The War of Attrition Dimension (ADD-004)

CP2 confirmed: Melissa's financial tactics operate within a war-of-attrition dynamic. The cumulative financial cost to Eli — paying childcare on denied visits, defending against contempt threats, managing logistics costs — creates sustained economic pressure regardless of whether any individual threat executes.

Pre-dataset anchor: June 3, 2022 contempt summons for child support timing was executed. This establishes that Melissa has followed through on financial contempt actions before, which gives weight to subsequent threats.

---

## Argument Structure

The billing-on-refused-visits pattern is self-evidencing when the receipt dates and visit-refusal dates are laid side by side:

1. Pull the Phase C visit-refusal dates from RF-02 incident files
2. Pull the childcare receipt dates from the receipt log
3. Match them — overlapping dates = Eli billed for childcare on a weekend he was trying to exercise his parenting time

No testimony required. The documents prove the pattern.
